Event: Magic Training - Longtail
Event Date: 17/02/2025
Sage Bot Item Code: AR227
Longtail Tamer Outfit

Once in a while, the unit surrounds themself with a jelly shield. The shield absorbs 700000 damage of any type and lasts for up to 4 sec. When the shield wears off or is removed, it exploded and deals 4 magic damage to 3 random enemies and covers them in jelly for 3 sec. The armor wearer restores health equal to 100% of the damage dealt by the ability. Enemies covered in jelly cannot attack or move and take 40% more damage for 3 sec. When the ability wears off, the jelly explodes and sticks to 2 nearby enemies for 3 sec. Their attack speed is reduced by 25% and they have 50% chance to miss their target on attack.

Requirements: 98-100

User rating: item not rated yet

Event: Magic Training - Longtail

Event date: 17/02/2025

Sage bot code: AR227

First trigger: 3 sec

Cooldown: 9 secs
